title: Senior Product Manager (Health Technology)
description:
About Us

Mesh Bio is a leading digital health company revolutionizing healthcare delivery through advanced analytics solutions. Mesh Bio has received international recognition and accolades.

Our platform leverages predictive models to improve patient outcomes, helping healthcare providers offer more personalized, data-driven care. We are looking for an experienced professional to lead the deployment of our cutting-edge software solutions to healthcare providers.

The Senior Product Manager (“Manager”) is a key commercial position that is dedicated to delivering Mesh Bio’s healthcare software solutions to customers and partners. The Manager is expected to work together with other company functions, including the Engineering and the Products team in meeting customers’ needs.

Responsibilities and Duties

  • Explore and evaluate new opportunities, validate customers, identify new business models and areas where Mesh Bio’s solutions can add significant, differentiated value.
  • Lead the customer’s discovery process for new products, helping to unearth customer’s business objectives and current pain points and translate to user requirements specification.
  • Draft up product requirements specifications which matches product features and capability built on users’ requirements.
  • Act as a key liaison between Products, Sales, and Engineering, funnelling customer feedback to help shape the product roadmap.
  • Assist in conducting competitive analyses and preparing go-to-market plans for new products, including early-stage needs finding, user research, market analysis.
  • Work closely with the Products and the Engineering teams to build prototypes, test, and iterate.
  • Conduct Proof-of-Concepts/Pilots where necessary to help customers validate technical requirements.
  • Assist in delivering value-based demonstrations highlighting our platform’s ecosystem
  • Lead and manage the implementation of product new features, along with the Engineering teams.
  • Serves as Technical Lead for Healthcare Solutions Engineers, Customer Success Specialists and managing their tech related issues and communicate with Engineers.
  • Assist in managing the implementation and onboarding of new customers
  • Own and drive the product vision, roadmap strategy, ensuring alignment with business goals and customer needs.
  • Serves as a key liaison within the commercial teams in meeting the needs of ISO27001 and ISO13485
  • Contribute to the success of a rapidly changing and growing organization
  • Any ad hoc work related tasks as mutually agreed with direct superior.


QUALIFICATIONS:

  • Min Bachelor’s degree in Life Sciences, Nursing, Biomedical engineering or equivalent
  • 3 - 5 years prior experience working with an early-stage proprietary product in a life science, healthcare, or medical device setting
  • Comfortable and confident speaking to doctors and healthcare workers
  • Comfortable with collaboration, open communication and reaching across functional borders
  • Ability to multi-task and manage tasks with varying priorities

Personality requirements: Self-starter, client-oriented, independent, and able to function in a dynamic start-up environment.

What We Offer- Opportunity to work on cutting-edge digital health solutions with a global impact.

- A dynamic and collaborative work environment.

- Competitive compensation and benefits package.

- Career growth and professional development opportunities.

How to Apply

If you are excited about shaping the future of digital health and have the skills and experience we are looking for, we would love to hear from you! Please send your resume and a cover letter outlining your qualifications and motivation to careers@meshbio.com.

Mesh Bio Pte Ltd is an equal opportunity employer and is committed to fostering an inclusive workforce. We do not discriminate based on race, colour, religion, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, genetics, disability, age, or veteran status. We believe in attracting, developing, and retaining a diverse team of talented individuals. Our hiring decisions are based on qualifications, merit, and business need. We encourage individuals from all backgrounds to apply for opportunities with us.

Join us in our mission to create an inclusive and welcoming environment where everyone can thrive and contribute their unique perspectives and talents.

postedCompany.description: Mesh Bio is a fast growing digital health startup focused on addressing the growing challenges in care delivery. Mesh Bio develops AI powered clinical decision support analytics and automation solutions for management of chronic disease, such as cardiovascular disease. These solutions enable data driven care delivery, improving patient engagement, and health outcomes.
postedCompany.name: MESH BIO PTE. LTD.
